notAttemptedReason: Session fetch budget — recovery requires a live, rate-limited request per candidate year; V0.2.1 attempted 3 more records (5 total across V0.2+V0.2.1) to extend coverage while leaving budget for the calendar Mệnh panel corpus and required tooling. Fully reusable for the remaining 13.

recovered.note: Recovered in V0.2; unchanged this pass.

Two independent WebFetch passes of https://tuvi.cohoc.net/lich-la-so-tu-vi-ngay-18-12-1997.html agreed exactly on lunar month 11, lunar day 19, gender Âm Nam, Mệnh score 1, whole-chart total -1.18 — all matching HK-PUB-005 exactly.

Recovered via 2-of-3 independent WebFetch passes (majority, not unanimous — see limitations.v0.2.1.md 'transient extraction error' finding): pass 1 and pass 3 both gave lunar month 12/day 12, Mệnh 2, total 6.76 (exact match to HK-PUB-006), and pass 3's verbatim quote also matched the exact source phrase 'ÂM NAM sinh năm KỶ TỊ giờ TÍ ngày 12 tháng 12 Âm Lịch' — a strong independent confirmation. Pass 2 alone reported Mệnh 1 / total 6.75, contradicted by both other passes; treated as a single transient extraction error, not a genuine site value.

ambiguousOrMismatched.note: Unchanged from V0.2. Other candidate (1934-05-23) not attempted.

3 of 4 numeric/identity fields matched HK-PUB-003 exactly (lunar month 3, lunar day 19, gender Dương Nam, Mệnh score 1.0), but the whole-chart total disagreed (-3.19 shown vs. -3.27 expected), confirmed by 2 independent passes both giving -3.19. Per the 'a total-only match is invalid' rule this is not promoted to recovered, but per the unique-candidate rule a mismatch on 1 of 4 fields with 3/4 agreeing is not a clean rejection either — genuinely inconclusive. The other candidate (1910-04-28) was not attempted (implausible/very old, and out of this session's budget). Flagged for a follow-up pass rather than forced either way.
